duplicate_condition: Same endpoint, same symbol, same field, same observed behavior within 7 days
default_action: Close as duplicate or link reports
notes: Keep stronger evidence as the canonical issue.

duplicate_condition: Same full URL and same error message
notes: Useful for rate-limit or endpoint-availability observations.

duplicate_condition: Same missing requested symbol from same symbol batch
notes: Preserve unique timestamps as additional evidence.
One confirmed enum record can have many evidence rows.

duplicate_condition: Same app-specific behavior through same app workflow
default_action: Document once as app behavior finding
notes: Do not convert repeated app behavior into Yahoo API change without raw endpoint evidence.
